key_finding: WRRA correct-alignment DOES NOT REPLICATE (exp_078 71.4% p=0.039 → 52% p=1.0). K-probe added: K=52-64%, V=40-52%, none significant. Novel: V>K at ALL 4 layers for numeric probing at computation positions.
evidence_impact: Downgrades WRRA smoking gun from Moderate to Weak/Inconclusive. Adds V>K at computation positions (complementary to K>V position-sweep). Forward-looking probing replicates perfectly.
next_planned: Scale WRRA to n≥100 (1600+ problems) or use harder benchmark. Consider V>K at computation positions for paper as K=routing/V=content evidence.
